description: Serper provides a hosted API that returns Google search result data such as web search, images, news, maps, places, videos, shopping, scholar, patents, and autocomplete. It is a business-to-business service accessed through customer accounts and API credits.
summary: Serper exposes one authenticated HTTP API surface for Google SERP data at `https://google.serper.dev`, using a user-managed API key sent in the `X-API-KEY` header.
